channel.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Jun 7th - Jun 13th, 2021
item.description:
Productivity

Time Tracking

  • Timetrapstars1.2k - Simple timetracker.

    • Productivity

    Note Taking and Lists

  • Taskwarrior - Manage your TODO list.
  • Terminal velocity - A fast note-taking app.
  • eurekastars331 - Input and store your ideas.

    • Command Line Learning

  • cmdchallenge - Presents small shell challenge with user submitted solutions.
  • explainshell - Type a snippet to see the help text for each argument.
  • howdoistars8.9k - Instant coding answers.
  • how2stars5.4k - Node.js implementation of howdoi.
  • teachcodestars330 - Guide for the earliest lessons of coding.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
Files and Directories

Search

  • rarestars85 - Real-time regex aggregation and analysis.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps May 17th - May 23rd, 2021
item.description:
Development

Release

  • semantic-releasestars12.6k - Fully automated version management and package publishing.

    • Utilities

  • gopassstars4k - Fully-featured password manager.

    • Development

  • grexstars3.7k - Generate regular expressions from user-provided test cases.

    • Files and Directories

    Deleting, Copying, and Renaming

  • rename-clistars94 - Rename files quickly.
  • diskonautstars911 - Disk space navigator.

    • Files and Directories

    Files

  • organize-rt - organize-cli in Rust with more customization.
  • unix-permissionsstars108 - Swiss Army knife for Unix permissions.
  • entrstars1.1k - Run an arbitrary command when files change.
  • organize-clistars269 - Organize your files automatically.

    • Utilities

    Markdown

  • DocTocstars3.4k - Generates table of contents for markdown files.
  • gripstars5.2k - Preview markdown files as GitHub would render them.
  • mdvstars1.5k - Styled terminal markdown viewer.

    • Data Manipulation

    Text

  • stegcloakstars2.1k - Hide secrets with invisible characters in plain text securely.

    • Files and Directories

    File Managers

  • Vifm - VI influnced file manager.

    • Files and Directories

    File Sync/Sharing

  • rclonestars27.2k - Sync files with various cloud providers.
  • ffsendstars5.2k - Quick file share.

    • Development

    Devops

  • PingMestars398 - Send messages/alerts to multiple messaging platforms & email.

    • Productivity

    Calendars

  • remind - A sophisticated calendar and alarm program.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps May 10th - May 16th, 2021
item.description:
Development

Database

  • usqlstars6.4k - Universal SQL client with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps May 3rd - May 9th, 2021
item.description:
Version Control

  • SnowFSstars619 - A fast, scalable version control system for binaries.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Apr 5th - Apr 11th, 2021
item.description:
Development

Devops

  • k9sstars11.9k - Manage Kubernetes Clusters.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Mar 22nd - Mar 28th, 2021
item.description:
Development

  • juststars2.8k - Modern make-like command runner.

    • Development

    Docker

  • lstagsstars281 - Synchronize images across registries.
  • docklystars2.8k - Interactively manage containers.
  • lazydockerstars17.7k - Simple docker/docker-compose interface.
  • docker-pushrmstars58 - Push a readme to container registries.

    • Data Manipulation

  • visidatastars3.8k - Spreadsheet multitool for data discovery and arrangement.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Mar 8th - Mar 14th, 2021
item.description:
Entertainment

Music

  • swaglyrics-for-spotifystars242 - Spotify lyrics.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Data Manipulation

Processors

  • jqstars19.4k - JSON processor.
  • yqstars1.5k - YAML processor.
  • daselstars891 - JSON/YAML/TOML/XML processor (like jq/yq).
  • ramda-clistars521 - Process data with functional pipelines.
  • yaml-clistars71 - Query/update YAML.

    • Data Manipulation

    JSON

  • jpstars30 - JSON parser.
  • underscore-clistars1.7k - Utility-belt for hacking JSON and Javascript.

    • Data Manipulation

    Columns

  • parse-columns-clistars46 - Parse text columns to JSON.
  • q - Execution of SQL-like queries on CSV/TSV/tabular text file.

    • Entertainment

    Video

  • editlystars2.8k - Declarative video editing.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Oct 12th - Oct 18th, 2020
item.description:

Social Media

  • kircstars423 - Tiny IRC client.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2020

Git

  • gdrive-downloaderstars105 - Download files/folders from Google Drive.

Calendars

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2020

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Feb 24th - Mar 1st, 2020
item.description:

Database

  • wipe-modulesstars312 - Remove node_modules of inactive projects.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
Images

Image Conversion

  • korkutstars320 - Quick and simple image processing.
  • imagemagick - Gold standard for anything images.

    • Productivity

    Calendars

  • calcurse - Calendar and scheduling.
  • gcalclistars2.5k - Google calendar client.
  • khalstars1.7k - CalDAV ready CLI and TUI calendar.

    • Files and Directories

    Search

  • brootstars5.2k - Fuzzy finder similar to fzf, but with space usage visualization.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Feb 3rd - Feb 9th, 2020
item.description:

  • bitwisestars394 - Base conversion and bit manipulator in ncurses.

  • splash-clistars445 - Beautiful wallpapers from Unsplash.
  • JackPaperstars8 - Set images from Unsplash as wallpaper.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Aug 5th - Aug 11th, 2019
item.description:

Text Editors

  • microstars16.8k - A simple and intuitive editor.

    • Files and Directories

    Search

  • fdstars17.2k - A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to find.

    • Productivity

    Time Tracking

  • Timewarriorstars563 - Utility with simple stopwatch, calendar-based backfill and flexible reporting.
  • Watsonstars1.8k - Generate reports for clients and manage your time.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Jul 29th - Aug 4th, 2019
item.description:
Productivity

Note Taking and Lists

  • td-clistars126 - A TODO manager to organize and manage your TODO's across multiple projects.

    • Utilities

    macOS

  • website-popup-clistars15 - Open a website in a popup.
  • dark-modestars572 - Toggle dark mode.

    • Utilities

  • pass - Password manager.

    • Utilities

    System Interaction Utilities

  • battery-level-clistars19 - Get current battery level.
  • brightness-clistars183 - Change screen brightness (windowsstars11).
  • yankstars1.2k - Yank terminal output to clipboard.
  • screensaverstars31 - Start the screensaver.
  • google-font-installerstars132 - Download and install Google Web Fonts on your local machine.
  • neofetchstars11.6k - System information tool.
  • Glances - System monitoring tool.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Jul 22nd - Jul 28th, 2019
item.description:
Files and Directories

File Managers

  • lfstars3.2k - Fast, extensively customizable file manager.

    • Development

    Database

  • sqllinestars423 - Shell for issuing SQL via JDBC.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Jul 15th - Jul 21st, 2019
item.description:
Development

Boilerplate

  • yostars3.3k - Scaffolding tool for running Yeoman generators.
  • boilrstars1.3k - Create projects from boilerplate templates.
  • cookiecutterstars14.4k - Create projects from templates.
  • mevn-clistars720 - Light speed setup for MEVN (Mongo Express Vue Node) Apps.
  • scaffold-staticstars112 - Scaffolding utility for vanilla JS.

    • Utilities

    Shell Utilities

  • hasstars316 - Checks for the presence of various commands and their versions on the path.
  • Ultimate Plumberstars7.1k - Write Linux pipes with live previews.
  • fkill-clistars6.3k - Simple cross-platform process killer.
  • task-spooler - Queue jobs for linear execution.
  • undollarstars75 - Strip the '$' preceding copy-pasted terminal commands.
  • pipe_execstars40 - Run executables from stdin, pipes and ttys without creating a temporary file.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Jul 8th - Jul 14th, 2019
item.description:
Development

Devops

  • flogstars558 - A fake log generator for log formats such as apache-common, apache error and RFC3164 syslog.

    • Files and Directories

    File Sync/Sharing

  • share-clistars238 - Share files with your local network.

    • Just for Fun

  • text-memestars88 - Generate text memes.

    • Utilities

  • archive-type-clistars7 - Detect archive type for a file or stdin.

    • Development

  • foystars176 - Lightweight general purpose task runner/build tool.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Jul 1st - Jul 7th, 2019
item.description:
Entertainment

Games

  • Cataclysm-DDA - Turn-based survival game set in a post-apocalyptic world.
  • Dwarf Fortress - Roguelike construction and management simulation.

    • Utilities

    macOS

  • open-pip-clistars185 - Watch videos in picture-in-picture player.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Jun 24th - Jun 30th, 2019

Devops

  • pm2 - Production Process Manager for Node.js.

item.description:
Development

Web Development

  • ipfs-deploystars772 - Deploy static websites to IPFSstars19.3k.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps May 6th - May 12th, 2019
item.description:
Other Awesome Lists

  • awesome-command-line-appsstars3.4k – An alternative awesome list of cli apps.
  • awesome-macos-command-linestars25.3k - Shell commands and tools specific to macOS.
  • awesome-git-addonsstars1.3k - Addons that extend git cli.
  • awesome-shellstars21.7k – Command-line utilities and frameworks.
  • terminals-are-sexystars10k – Terminal frameworks, plugins & resources.
  • awesome-zsh-pluginsstars9.4k – ZSH frameworks, plugins, tutorials & themes.
  • awesome-nodejs clisstars41.6k – Node.js modules and resources.

    • Files and Directories

    Files

  • webtorrent-clistars649 – Streaming torrent client.
  • batstars26.9k - A cat clone with syntax highlighting.

    • Productivity

    Note Taking and Lists

  • taskellstars1.2k - Interactive kanban board/task manager.

    • Entertainment

    Video

  • mpv - Superior video player.

    • Entertainment

    Music

  • beetsstars10.1k - Music library manager and tagger.
  • ncmpcppstars1.2k - mpd client.

    • Utilities

    Terminal Sharing Utilities

  • tmate - Instant terminal (tmux) sharing.

    • Development

    Npm

  • updatesstars65 - Flexible npm dependency update tool.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Apr 1st - Apr 7th, 2019
item.description:
Other

  • Qalculatestars425 - Calculate non-trival math expressions. Unit conversions, symbolic calculations and more.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Mar 25th - Mar 31st, 2019
item.description:
Entertainment

  • football-clistars992 - Get live scores, fixtures, standings of almost every football competition/league.

    • Entertainment

    Music

  • cmusstars4.2k - Small, fast and powerful console music player.
  • itunes-remotestars409 - Control iTunes via CLI.
  • nehmstars83 - Download tracks from SoundCloud.

    • Entertainment

    Social Media

  • TTYtterstars320 - Twitter client.
  • Rainbowstreamstars3.3k - A smart and nice Twitter client on the terminal.
  • WeeChat - Fast, light and extensible chat client.

    • Entertainment

    Video

  • youtube-dlstars94.5k - Download videos from YouTube.com and many other video sites.
  • streamlinkstars6.2k - Extract streams from various websites to a video player of your choosing.
  • mps-youtubestars6.7k - Youtube player.

    • Entertainment

    Movies

  • moviemonstars167 - Everything about your movies.
  • moviestars103 - Get movie info or compare movies.

    • Development

  • cgasmstars325 - Gives x86 assembly documentation.
  • legitstars518 - Generate Open Source licences as files or file headers.
  • mklicensestars142 - Create a custom LICENSE file painlessly with customized info.
  • reboundstars3.5k - Fetch Stack Overflow results in your terminal when you get a compiler error.

    • Development

    Web Development

  • caniuse-cmdstars1.5k - Search caniuse.com about browser support of feature.
  • is-up-clistars289 - Check whether a website is up.
  • acmetoolstars1.8k - An automatic certificate acquisition tool for ACME (Let's Encrypt).
  • wp-clistars4.4k - Manage WordPress installations, update plugins, set up multisite installs and much more.
  • diff2html-clistars294 - Parse git diffs as JSON and generate pretty HTML.
  • add-gitignorestars482 - Interactively generate a .gitignore for your project based on your needs.
  • Dischargestars486 - Deploy static websites to Amazon S3.
  • reachablestars12 - Check if a domain is up.
  • simplehttpstars27 - Easily serve a local directory over http.
  • shell2httpstars755 - Execute shell commands via HTTP server.
  • HTTP Promptstars8.2k - Interactive HTTP client featuring autocomplete and syntax highlighting.

    • Development

    Database

  • myclistars9.6k - MySQL client with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.
  • pgclistars9.6k - Postgres client with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.

    • Productivity

  • AutoScreenshotUploaderstars35 - Capture and upload screenshots to imgur.
  • bitly-clientstars38 - Bitly client.
  • doingstars812 - Keep track of what you’re doing and track what you’ve done.
  • ffscreencaststars1.6k - A ffmpeg screencast with video overlay and multi monitor support.
  • meetup-clistars40 - Meetup.com client.
  • terjirastars722 - Jira client.
  • iptstars6 - Pivotal Tracker client.
  • g3lstars213 - Easiest git cli in the w0rld!
  • uber-clistars1.1k - Uber client.
  • Bukustars4.4k - Browser-independent bookmark manager.
  • googlerstars5.1k - Google from the terminal.
  • papisstars21 - Extensible document and bibliography manager.

    • Productivity

    Time Tracking

  • morostars393 - Simple tool for tracking work hours.

    • Productivity

    Note Taking and Lists

  • ideastars172 - A lightweight tool for keeping ideas in a safe place quick and easy.
  • geeknotestars2.1k - Evernote client.
  • snclistars329 - Simplenote client.
  • taskbookstars8.1k - Tasks, boards & notes for the command-line habitat.

    • Productivity

    Finance

  • ledger - Powerful, double-entry accounting system on the terminal
  • moedastars114 - Foreign exchange rates and currency conversion.
  • cash-clistars167 - Convert Currency Rates.
  • cointopstars2.2k - Track cryptocurrencies.

    • Productivity

    Presentations

  • WOPRstars2.9k - A simple markup language for creating rich terminal reports, presentations and infographics.
  • decktapestars1.8k - PDF exporter for HTML presentations.
  • mdpstars4k - A command-line based markdown presentation tool.
  • sent - Simple plaintext presentation tool.

    • Utilities

  • sstars1.8k - Open a web search in your terminal.
  • aria2stars22.8k - HTTP, FTP, SFTP, BitTorrent and Metalink download utility.
  • wegostars6.7k - Get the weather.
  • weather-clistars58 - Check the weather.
  • mapsciistars5.3k - Terminal Map Viewer.
  • getnews.techstars98 - Fetch news headlines from various news outlets.
  • carbon-now-clistars5k - Generate beautiful images of your code.
  • awesome-finderstars199 - Search the awesome lists without a browser.
  • shallow-backupstars738 - Git integrated backup tool.

    • Utilities

    macOS

  • app-path-clistars38 - Get the path to an app.
  • bundle-id-clistars19 - Get bundle identifier from a bundle name: Safari → com.apple.Safari.
  • bundle-name-clistars10 - Get bundle name from a bundle identifier: com.apple.Safari → Safari.
  • osx-version-clistars14 - Get the macOS version.
  • osx-wifi-clistars78 - Manage wifi connections.
  • strongholdstars832 - Configure security settings from the terminal.

    • Utilities

    Terminal Sharing Utilities

  • localtunnelstars11.9k - Expose your localhost to the world for easy testing and sharing.
  • ngrok - Secure introspectable tunnels to localhost.
  • seashells.io - Pipe output to the web.
  • teleconsole - Share your UNIX terminal.
  • OverTimestars391 - Time-overlap tables for remote teams.

    • Utilities

    Network Utilities

  • speedtest-netstars522 - Test internet connection speed and ping using speedtest.net.
  • speed-teststars3.5k - speedtest-net wrapper with different UI.
  • speedtest-clistars10.9k - Test internet bandwidth using speedtest.net.

    • Utilities

    Theming and Customization

  • pywalstars5.2k - Generate and change color-schemes, then apply them system-wide to all of your favourite programs.

    • Development

    Text Editors

  • kakounestars7k - Modal editor inspired by vim.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Mar 11th - Mar 17th, 2019
item.description:
Entertainment

Social Media

  • irssistars2.3k - IRC chat client.

    • Development

    Release

  • clogstars670 - A conventional changelog for the rest of us.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Mar 4th - Mar 10th, 2019
item.description:
Files and Directories

Files

  • transmission-cli - Torrent client for your command line.

    • Development

    Npm

  • npm-name-clistars242 - Check whether a package name is available on npm.
  • npm-user-clistars18 - Get user info of a npm user.
  • npm-homestars173 - Open the npm page of the package in the current directory.
  • pkg-dir-clistars13 - Find the root directory of a npm package.
  • npm-check-updatesstars6.1k - Find newer versions of package dependencies than what your package.json allows.

    • Utilities

    Theming and Customization

  • wallpaper-clistars113 - Get or set the desktop wallpaper.
  • themerstars4.2k - Generate personalized themes for your editor, terminal, wallpaper, Slack, and more.

    • Just for Fun

  • quote-clistars54 - Get a random quote or the quote of the day in your CLI.
  • cowsaystars182 - A configurable talking cow (and other animals).
  • fortunestars163 - Shows a random fortune.
  • ponysaystars991 - Pony rewrite of cowsay.
  • yosaystars187 - Like cowsay, but for yeoman.
  • lolcatstars4.5k - Outputs text in rainbow colors.

    • Other

    Emoji

  • emojstars2.1k - Find relevant emoji from text on the command-line.
  • emoji-finderstars16 - Quickly find and copy emoji to the clipboard via the command-line.
  • ojistars669 - Interactive text emoji maker.

    • Development

    Devops

  • htconvertstars172 - Convert .htaccess redirects to nginx.conf redirects.

    • Entertainment

  • newsboatstars1.6k - An extendable RSS feed reader for text terminals.

    • Development

    Release

  • releasestars3.3k - Generate changelogs with a single command.
  • npstars6.1k - A better npm publish.
  • release-itstars4.1k - Automate releases for Git repositories and/or npm packages. Changelog generation, GitHub/GitLab releases, etc.

    • Data Manipulation

    Text

  • figlet - Creates large text out of ASCII characters.

    • Utilities

    Network Utilities

  • get-port-clistars105 - Get an available port.
  • is-reachable-clistars15 - Check if hostnames are reachable or not.

    • Data Manipulation

    JSON

  • fxstars10.7k - Command-line JSON viewer.
  • vjstars51 - Makes JSON human readable.

    • Productivity

  • NeoMutt - Email client.

    • Screensavers

  • cmatrixstars1.9k - Show a scrolling 'Matrix' like screen.
  • YuleLogstars41 - Terminal based Christmas YuleLog fireplace.

    • Files and Directories

    Search

  • fselectstars2.9k - Find files with SQL-like queries.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Feb 25th - Mar 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Files and Directories

Search

  • fzfstars36.6k - A general purpose command-line fuzzy finder, can be used with any list: files/directories, command history, processes, hostnames, bookmarks, git commits, etc.
  • happyfinderstars316 - (another) Fuzzy file finder for the command line.
  • find-up-clistars24 - Find a file by walking up parent directories.
  • ripgrepstars25k - A line-oriented search tool that recursively searches your current directory for a regex pattern.

    • Files and Directories

    Directory Navigation

  • autojumpstars12.6k - A cd command that learns - easily navigate directories from the command line.
  • fzstars368 - Seamless fuzzy tab completion for z.
  • gotostars705 - Directory aliases for the shell with autocomplete.

    • Files and Directories

    Files

  • NCDu - A disk usage analyzer with an ncurses interface.

    • Utilities

    Terminal Sharing Utilities

  • gottystars15.3k - Share your terminal as a web application.
  • mosh - Remote SSH client that allows roaming with intermittent connectivity.
  • serveo - Expose local servers to the internet using only a SSH client.
  • warpstars1.5k - Secure and simple terminal sharing.

    • Entertainment

    Social Media

  • facebook-clistars353 - Facebook command line interface.

    • Development

    Web Development

  • surge - Deploy a directory to the web.

    • Utilities

    macOS

  • active-win-clistars41 - Get the title/id/etc of the active window.

    • Images

    Image Conversion

  • imgpstars773 - Blazing fast batch image resizer and rotator.

    • Files and Directories

    File Managers

  • nnnstars11.4k - File browser and disk usage analyzer with excellent desktop integration.

    • Screensavers

  • cli-fireplacestars23 - Shows digital fireplace.

item.title: agarrharr/awesome-cli-apps Dec 14th - Dec 20th, 2015
item.description:
Development

Web Development

  • pageres-clistars1.4k - Capture website screenshots.
  • strip-css-comments-clistars29 - Strip comments from CSS.
  • viewport-list-clistars46 - Return a list of devices and their viewports.
  • loadteststars2.1k - Runs a load test on the selected URL. Easy to extend minimally for your own ends.

    • Utilities

    macOS

  • lnfs-clistars5 - Safely force create symlinks.

    • Files and Directories

    Deleting, Copying, and Renaming

  • trash-clistars893 - Move files and directories to the trash.
  • empty-trash-clistars90 - Empty the trash.

    • Files and Directories

    Directory Navigation

  • pmstars144 - The easy way to switch to your projects on the shell.
  • zstars13.1k - z is the new j, yo.

    • Version Control

    Git

  • CLI GitHubstars405 - 📺 A fancy GitHub client for command line.

    • Images

    Gif Creation

  • gifsiclestars2.5k - Create, manipulate, and optimize GIF images and animations.
  • ttygifstars3.5k - Convert terminal recordings to animated gifs.
  • ttygifstars247 - ttyrec to gif.

    • Screensavers

  • pipes.shstars1.4k - Shows random pipes that grow across the screen.

    • Graphics

  • cli-mandelbrotstars62 - A cli for traversing the Mandelbrot fractal.
  • sparkly-clistars108 - Generate sparklines ▁▂▃▅▂▇..

    • Other

  • detect-indent-clistars18 - Detect the indentation of code.
  • fullname-clistars15 - Get the fullname of the current user.
  • gzip-size-clistars161 - Get the gzipped size of a file or stdin.
  • kill-tabsstars277 - Kill all Chrome tabs to improve performance, decrease battery usage, and save memory.
  • leven-clistars34 - Measure the difference between two strings using the Levenshtein distance algorithm.
  • open-shortcut-clistars12 - Open the URL from a web shortcut file in the browser.
  • shortcut-url-clistars9 - Get the URL from a web shortcut file.
  • to-double-quotesstars12 - Convert matching single-quotes to double-quotes: I 'love' unicorns => I "love" unicorns.
  • to-single-quotesstars18 - Convert matching double-quotes to single-quotes: I "love" unicorns → I 'love' unicorns.
  • gdb-dashboardstars7.4k - Modular visual interface for GDB in Python.

item.description:
Files and Directories

Directory Navigation

  • fasdstars5.4k - Command-line productivity booster, offers quick access to files and directories, inspired by autojump, z and v.

    • Version Control

    Git

  • Gistupstars476 - Create a gist from terminal, then use git to update it.
  • git commanderstars1.1k - A git tool with a easy terminal interface.
  • git-statsstars5.7k - 🍀 A GitHub-like contributions calendar, but locally, with all your git commits.

    • Images

    Gif Creation

  • ttystudiostars3.2k - A terminal-to-gif recorder minus the headaches.
  • asciinemastars9.2k - Terminal session recorder and the best companion of asciinema.org.

    • Other

  • birthdaystars52 - Know when a friend's birthday is coming.
  • HASHA -clistars60 - Hashing made simple. Get the hash of text or stdin.
